LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO PLAINTIFF MERRICK BANK CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. MERRICK BANK IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT KRISTINA PINEDA IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,136.09 PLUS COSTS OF $404.50. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Jun-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Vivian Leung Lerche, Tel. No. 1-415-680-5731 specially appearing for the
Plaintiff;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Merrick Bank Corporation's motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted. Merrick Bank is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Kristina Pineda in the amount of $1,136.09 plus costs of $404.50. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vivian L. Lerche, Esq., Tel. 415.680.5731, specially appearing for plaintiff/moving party Merrick Bank Corporation;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Matter called.

There being no other appearance, the tentative ruling on Plaintiff Merrick Bank Corporation's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted is adopted as follows: the motion is unopposed and granted. The defendant shall prepare and attach to its Order a copy of the now admitted admissions indicating the determination herein. Said Order shall be served with Notice of Entry on the defendant within twenty days. Order signed. (See order filed this date for full terms.)

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT)
